description_long: This is a rectangular, woven wicker picnic basket with a tall, arched handle attached to the two shorter sides. The basket features a tightly interlaced weave pattern, giving it a sturdy and traditional appearance. The rim is reinforced with a thicker band of wicker, and a decorative looped edge runs along the top. The handle is made from the same wicker material, smoothly curved and securely fastened to the basket's rim. The interior is open and spacious, suitable for carrying food, drinks, or other picnic essentials. There is no visible lid or closure mechanism, leaving the contents easily accessible from the top.
description: A rectangular wicker picnic basket with a tall, arched handle and a decorative looped rim. The basket is open-topped and features a tightly woven pattern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide face of the basket and the full arch of the handle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile and the handle attachment on the short edge.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the basket's symmetry and woven texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and handle attachment.
attribute_handle_type: Single, tall, arched handle made of braided wicker, fixed at both ends to the short sides of the basket.
attribute_weave_pattern: Plain, tight weave with a decorative looped edge along the rim.
